steps.title: Find the outer and inner radii
steps.content:
Outside diameter = 60 inches → outer radius $R = 30$ inches
Wall thickness = $\frac{5}{8}$ inches → inner radius $r = 30 - \frac{5}{8} = \frac{235}{8}$ inches

steps.title: Calculate the radii difference of squares
Compute the volume using the hollow cylinder formula
steps.content:
$$V = \pi h(R^2 - r^2) = \pi \cdot 132 \cdot \frac{2,375}{64} = \frac{313,500\pi}{64} \approx 4,898.4 \times 3.14159 \approx 15,389 \text{ cubic inches}$$
That matches choice D — D is correct.
